# `api.partners.get`

> `GET /partner/{id}` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.partners.get(partner_id: str) -> Partner
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab partners get <partner_id>
```

GET /partner/{id}

## Response

Returns `Partner`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | `Optional[str]` | no | Partner ID |
| `name` | `Optional[str]` | no | Partner name |
| `type` | `Optional[str]` | no | Partner type |
| `contactInfo` | `Optional[dict]` | no | Contact information |
